basic_details.job_title: PGVCL Vidyut Sahayak (Junior Assistant) Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: Paschim Gujarat Vij Company Limited (PGVCL) has released a recruitment notification for Vidyut Sahayak (Junior Assistant) posts in 2026. The organisation invites online applications from eligible Persons with Benchmark Disability (PwBD) candidates for PGVCL, MGVCL, UGVCL and DGVCL.

Complete the registration process using valid details.
Fill out the application form correctly.

content_sections.heading: PGVCL Vidyut Sahayak (Junior Assistant) Recruitment 2026 Overview
Important Dates
content_sections.text: Starting Date for Apply Online: 17-07-2026 Last Date for Apply Online: 06-08-2026 up to 06:00 PM

content_sections.heading: PGVCL Vidyut Sahayak Vacancy 2026 - Post Details
content_sections.text: PGVCL has announced centralized recruitment for the post of Vidyut Sahayak (Junior Assistant). The recruitment is open only for eligible Persons with Benchmark Disability (PwBD) candidates across PGVCL and other participating power companies.

content_sections.heading: Who Can Apply for PGVCL Vidyut Sahayak Recruitment 2026?
content_sections.text: Candidates fulfilling the required eligibility criteria can apply for the Vidyut Sahayak (Junior Assistant) post. The eligibility details are as follows: PwBD Candidates: Only Persons with Benchmark Disability candidates are eligible to apply for this recruitment. Educational Qualification: Candidates must possess the prescribed qualification as mentioned in the detailed PGVCL notification.

content_sections.heading: PGVCL Vidyut Sahayak Recruitment 2026 - Age Limit
content_sections.text: Age limit details will be available in the detailed notification.

content_sections.heading: PGVCL Vidyut Sahayak Recruitment 2026 - Application Fee
content_sections.text: Application fee details will be mentioned in the detailed notification.

content_sections.heading: PGVCL Vidyut Sahayak Recruitment 2026 - Selection Process
content_sections.text: Selection process will be conducted as per PGVCL recruitment rules. Further details will be available in the detailed notification.

content_sections.heading: How to Apply for PGVCL Vidyut Sahayak Recruitment 2026
content_sections.text: Visit the official PGVCL website. Open the recruitment section. Read the official notification carefully. Click on the online application link. Complete the registration process using valid details. Fill out the application form correctly. Upload required documents and certificates. Submit the application form before the last date. Take a printout of the submitted application for future reference.
